differential_diagnoses: Portal hypertensive gastropathy or jejunal varices due to portal vein stenosis
Hemobilia secondary to pseudoaneurysm from prior biliary surgery
Portal biliopathy with associated ectopic varices
Chronic portal vein thrombosis with cavernous transformation
next_steps: Interventional radiology consultation for diagnostic mesenteric and portal venography
Selective hepatic artery angiography to rule out hepatic artery pseudoaneurysm or arteriovenous fistula
Balloon-assisted enteroscopy to visualize the biliary-enteric anastomosis site
Liver biopsy to assess for underlying hepatic vascular or parenchymal changes
Consultation with hepatobiliary surgery regarding the hepaticojejunostomy status
